case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. DOMINICA S ECHALAR et al

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW - JUDGMENT ON FILE
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ECHALAR, DOMINICA S

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DOMINICA S. ECHALAR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 7, 2012 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PROVIDE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE OF HER MONTHLY INCOME AND EXPENSES TO THE COURT BY AUGUST 30, 2012. COPIES OF WHATEVER IS PROVIDED TO THE COURT SHALL ALSO BE PROVIDED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR. ORDER RE CONTINUANCE SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND COUNTER AFFIDAVIT, RETURNED SERVED BY THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S OFFICE.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DOMINICA ECHALAR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. $1,274.04 OF THE AMOUNT HELD BY THE SHERIFF WILL BE PAID TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE BALANCE OF $1,274.04 PAID TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. $100 PER PAY PERIOD WILL BE WITHHELD BY THE EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: no appearances.

ruling: defendant dominica echalar's Claim Of Exemption is Granted in part. $1,274.04 of the amount held by the sheriff will be paid to the judgment creditor and the balance of $1,274.04 paid to the judgment debtor. $100 per pay period will be withheld by the earnings withholding order. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Notice

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - To be heard at 9:30 am on the Law & Motion calendar. Pro Tem Judge: James Watson, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Continued To Sep-07-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DOMINICA S. ECHALAR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Continued to September 7, 2012 at 9:30am in Dept. 302. Judgment Debtor shall provide documentary evidence of her monthly income and expenses to the Court by August 30, 2012. Copies of whatever is provided to the Court shall also be provided to the Judgment Creditor. Order re continuance signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
